summary: Comprehensive testing of Chroma Key Protocol v4 with new features: GuidedListen page with audio player/visualizer/Spotify embed/social sharing/content tabs, SpinWheel with social share buttons on result, Admin Panel with 6 tabs. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint accessible
Backend: Admin user login (test@demo.com) with is_admin=true, act3_unlocked=true
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected (401)
Backend: Auth me without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/tracks returns tracks with lightcodes, shadowcodes, lore, spotify_uri fields
Backend: GET /api/tracks requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/tracks returns all tracks
Backend: PUT /api/admin/tracks/{track_id} can update content fields (lore, lightcodes, shadowcodes, spotify_uri)
Backend: GET /api/admin/license-keys returns license keys
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns user list
Backend: GET /api/progress returns user progress
Backend: GET /api/license/status returns unlock status
Backend: POST /api/license/validate rejects invalid keys
Backend: Journal CRUD operations (create, read, delete)
Backend: GET /api/reflections/{act} returns reflections
Backend: GET /api/protocol/sessions returns session list
Backend: POST /api/protocol/chat requires authentication
Frontend: Login page loads with cyber-noir design
Frontend: Login with test@demo.com/password123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard loads with roadmap showing 4 act cards
Frontend: Sidebar navigation shows Guided Listen link at /listen
Frontend: Guided Listen page loads with track sidebar (22 tracks)
Frontend: Guided Listen - first track selected by default
Frontend: Guided Listen - content tabs (Backstory, Lightcodes, Shadowcodes, System) switch correctly
Frontend: Guided Listen - play button exists and is clickable
Frontend: Guided Listen - prev/next track navigation works
Frontend: Guided Listen - share buttons (X, FB, Copy) present in header
Frontend: Spin Wheel page loads at /wheel with 12 segments
Frontend: Spin Wheel - spin button works and wheel animates
Frontend: Spin Wheel - result appears after spin with track name
Frontend: Spin Wheel - share buttons (X, FB, Copy) present in result
Frontend: Admin Panel loads at /admin with 6 tabs
Frontend: Admin Panel - Audio Bank tab shows tracks with Upload/Edit/Delete buttons
Frontend: Admin Panel - Track Content tab shows 22 tracks with Edit Content buttons
Frontend: Admin Panel - Wheel Config tab shows bonus tracks grid
Frontend: Admin Panel - License Keys tab accessible
Frontend: Admin Panel - Users tab accessible
Frontend: Admin Panel - Setup Guide tab accessible
critical_code_review_comments: GuidedListen.js properly fetches tracks from /api/tracks and displays lightcodes, shadowcodes, lore, spotify_uri in content tabs
SpinWheel.js correctly shows 12 bonus tracks and includes social share buttons (X, FB, Copy) in result modal
AdminPanel.js has all 6 tabs (Audio Bank, Track Content, Wheel Config, License Keys, Users, Setup Guide) with proper data-testid attributes
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Audio tracks are seeded placeholders without actual audio files uploaded - Spotify URIs not set on tracks yet (MOCKED)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test users and tracks
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested in v4: 1) GuidedListen page at /listen with full audio player, visualizer, Spotify embed toggle, social sharing (X/FB/Copy), content tabs (Backstory/Lightcodes/Shadowcodes/System), track sidebar with 22 tracks. 2) SpinWheel at /wheel with 12 bonus track segments, spin animation, result modal with social share buttons. 3) AdminPanel at /admin with 6 tabs: Audio Bank (track management), Track Content (edit lore/lightcodes/shadowcodes/spotify_uri), Wheel Config (bonus tracks grid), License Keys, Users, Setup Guide. All sidebar navigation working including new 'Guided Listen' link. Audio tracks are placeholder - no actual audio files uploaded yet.

notes.mocked_data: Audio tracks are seeded placeholders without actual audio files uploaded. Spotify URIs are not set on tracks yet.
notes.protocol_engine_llm: Uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library. Budget exceeded error (402) is expected and handled gracefully.
